summary: Completed comprehensive testing of French Data Science Portfolio with all 24 projects. Application works perfectly on localhost with complete functionality: grid display, category filters, detailed modals, thematic images, and modal closing features. External URL has deployment routing issues.

deployment_issues.issue: Public URL serves Framer website instead of React portfolio application
deployment_issues.details: URL routing configuration issue - localhost:3000 works perfectly but external URL serves wrong content

passed_tests: All 24 data science projects displayed in grid layout (4 columns)
Category filters functional - 'Tous' shows 24 projects, ML (1), Data Engineering (6), Business Analytics (1), Data Analysis (6), Data Visualization (4), Data Science (6), Fundamentals (3)
Project modal opens with complete information: description, technologies, features & technical points, code snippet, GitHub link
Modal closing works with both Escape key and outside click
Thematic images loading from Unsplash for all projects
Navigation between sections works (About, Skills, Projects, Contact)
Hero section with CTA buttons functional
Contact section with multiple contact methods
Dark blue theme (#0a1628) consistent across application
Data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix external URL deployment configuration - the public URL (https://endayeaime-portfolio-ea-2ql1.preview.emergentagent.com) is serving a Framer website instead of the React portfolio application. Check ingress/routing configuration.
